description_long: This is a large rectangular office desk with a light wood surface and sturdy black metal legs. The desktop is cluttered with various office items, including a widescreen computer monitor, keyboard, mouse, several mugs, a bowl, a smartphone, a notepad, loose papers, and multiple pen holders. The desk appears to be designed for a single user, with the monitor centrally placed and other items distributed across the surface. The legs are simple, straight, and provide ample legroom beneath the desk. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for a professional or home office environment. There are no visible drawers or attached storage components, emphasizing a minimalist and open workspace.
description: A modern, rectangular office desk with a light wood top and black metal legs, covered with various office supplies and a computer setup.
description_view_0: Side view showing the narrow profile of the desk, with the monitor, keyboard, and scattered office items visible along the length.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the full desktop setup, including the centrally placed monitor, keyboard, mouse, and a variety of office supplies spread across the surface.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the arrangement of items from the other end and the clear leg space beneath.
description_view_3: Rear view of the desk, displaying the back of the monitor and the distribution of items along the desktop, with pen holders and mugs more visible.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the long edge with the monitor, keyboard, and primary workspace, while the opposite side is clear for legroom; the front is defined by the arrangement of the computer and writing materials.
